setting.policyDetail: Biswa Kalyan Rath is an Indian stand-up comedian, writer, and YouTuber. He came into prominence through a YouTube comedy series, Pretentious Movie Reviews with fellow comedian Kanan Gill.
setting.areYouSure:
Are you sure, you want to
logout from stage?
setting.app_share_text:
Have you seen Stage? They have quality Indian content in comedy, poetry, and storytelling.
From superstar artists to upcoming ones, you can discover them all on Stage. Get the App now! 
 https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=in.stage
setting.app_share_text_ios:
Have you seen Stage? They have quality Indian content in comedy, poetry, and storytelling.
From superstar artists to upcoming ones, you can discover them all on Stage. Get the App now! 
 https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=in.stage 
 https://apps.apple.com/us/app/id1531280099
setting.share_bottom_text: Share the app among friends and family and connect with your cultural roots
setting.app_whatsappshare_text:
Watch Webseries, Comedy, Ragni and many more haryanvi videos  only on STAGE app. 
 https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=in.stage 
 https://apps.apple.com/us/app/id1531280099
